nasb.text: Many times He would deliver them; They, however, were rebellious in their counsel, And so sank down in their iniquity.

esv.text: Many times he delivered them, but they were rebellious in their purposes and were brought low through their iniquity.

cnv.text: 神曾多次搭救他們， 他們卻故意悖逆， 以致因自己的罪孽降為卑微。

ccb.text: 祂多次拯救他们， 他们却执意背叛， 陷入罪中不能自拔。

csbs.text: 他多次解救他们， 他们却图谋悖逆， 在自己的罪孽中堕落。
